overall_rationale: The scope focuses on major companies in the semiconductor industry that are likely to have significant production outsourced to TSMC. Analyzing recent annual and quarterly reports (10-K, 10-Q) from these companies will provide insights into how they describe their dependence on TSMC, especially considering any recent changes in supply chain dynamics.
